title: Coral Lipid Assay for 96-well plates
author: Colleen B Bove
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bvcfn2tn

steps.title: Pull samples from -80 freezer and...
steps.instruction: Pull samples from -80 freezer and allow to thaw (maximum of 24 samples per plate in triplicate)

steps.title: Vortex sample and transfer 600 μL...
steps.instruction: Vortex sample and transfer 600 μL of coral tissue slurry sample to labelled 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Pre-make new 2:1 (CHCl 3 :CH...
steps.instruction: Pre-make new 2:1 (CHCl 3 :CH 3 OH) stock every day running plates

steps.title: Add 400 μL of CHCl 3...
steps.instruction: Add 400 μL of CHCl 3 and 200 μL of CH 3 OH in a 2:1 ratio to 1.5 mL sample tube

steps.title: Make a stock serial dilution in 7 1
steps.instruction: Make a stock serial dilution in 7 1.5 mL tubes for each plate

steps.title: Add 300 μL of CHCl 3...
steps.instruction: Add 300 μL of CHCl 3 to standard tubes 2 through 7

steps.title: Vortex then shake on plate shaker for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Vortex then shake on plate shaker for 20 minutes

steps.title: Add 160 μL of 0.05M NaCl (CHCl 3
steps.instruction: Add 160 μL of 0.05M NaCl (CHCl 3 : CH 3 OH : NaCl is in a 2:1:0.8 ratio – keep this ratio)

steps.title: Invert tubes gently two times and open and reclose lid
steps.instruction: Invert tubes gently two times and open and reclose lid

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3000 rpm for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3000 rpm for 5 minutes

steps.title: Remove CHCl 3 (top) layer and...
steps.instruction: Remove CHCl 3 (top) layer and dispose before taking 100 μL for the assay ( Do three times for 3 replicates of 100 μL )

steps.title: Add 600 μL of 1
steps.instruction: Add 600 μL of 1.5 mg/ml stock to standard tube 1.

steps.title: Pull 300 μL from tube 1...
steps.instruction: Pull 300 μL from tube 1 and place in tube 2. Back pipette to mix.

steps.title: Pull 300 μL from tube 2...
steps.instruction: Pull 300 μL from tube 2 and place in tube 3. Back pipette to mix.

steps.title: Repeat this process for tubes 3 through 6
steps.instruction: Repeat this process for tubes 3 through 6.

steps.title: Discard 300 μL from tube 6...
steps.instruction: Discard 300 μL from tube 6 so total volume equals 300 μL.

steps.title: Tube 7 is a blank of ONLY CHCl 3
steps.instruction: Tube 7 is a blank of ONLY CHCl 3 . DO NOT ADD CORN OIL %s %s Standard1234567 (blank)(mg/mL)1.50.750.3750.1880.0940.0470.000

steps.title: In a 96-well plate, add 100...
steps.instruction: In a 96-well plate, add 100 μL of sample or standard to each well in triplicate (see template below) %s %s 123456789101112A111S1S1S1S9S9S9S17S17S17B222S2S2S2S10S10S10S18S18S18C333S3S3S3S11S11S11S19S19S19D444S4S4S4S12S12S12S20S20S20E555S5S5S5S13S13S13S21S21S21F666S6S6S6S14S14S14S22S22S22GBBBS7S7S7S15S15S15S23S23S23HBBBS8S8S8S16S16S16S24S24S24

steps.title: Add 50 μL of CH 3 OH to each well
steps.instruction: Add 50 μL of CH 3 OH to each well

steps.title: Evaporate solvent on a 90°C hotplate for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Evaporate solvent on a 90°C hotplate for 10 minutes

steps.title: Add 100 μL H 2 SO...
steps.instruction: Add 100 μL H 2 SO 4 to each well ( wells will change from clear to yellow colour )

steps.title: Incubate on hotplate at 90°C for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate on hotplate at 90°C for 20 minutes

steps.title: Cool the plate on ice for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Cool the plate on ice for 2 minutes

steps.title: Transfer 75 μL of each sample...
steps.instruction: Transfer 75 μL of each sample or standard from the microplate to a new 96-well microplate ( wells may contain sticky residue and bubbles, but you should be able to avoid that to pull the required 75 μL)

steps.title: Add 34
steps.instruction: Add 34.5 μL of 0.2 mg/mL vanillin in 17% phosphoric acid to each well

steps.title: Incubate for 10 minutes ( should...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 minutes ( should change from yellow to pink color )

steps.title: Cover the plate again and read...
steps.instruction: Cover the plate again and read absorbance at 540 nm using microplate reader

steps.title: Calculate sample concentrations following method listed under 'Materials'
steps.instruction: Calculate sample concentrations following method listed under 'Materials'

steps.title: All portions of this protocol should...
steps.instruction: All portions of this protocol should be performed in a fume hood as much as possible with appropriate safety precautions, including gloves, lab coat, and closed toe shoes. **The key with this protocol is very careful pipetting**

description: Cover the plate and read background absorbance at 540 nm using microplate reader ( this is a baseline measure that is used for correcting the final plate absorbance )
